name: Cauldron of Rebirth
description:
This Tiny pot bears relief scenes of heroes on its cast-iron sides.
You can use the cauldron as a {@variantrule Spellcasting Focus|XPHB} for your spells, and it functions as a suitable component for the {@spell Scrying|XPHB} spell.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Brew Potion", "entries": ["When you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can use the cauldron to create a {@item Potion of Greater Healing|XDMG|Potion of Healing (greater)}, which takes 1 minute. The potion lasts for 24 hours, then
